author: Maya Srinivasan
text: Shipping a small durable workflow example today reminded me how much easier HITL gets once timeouts are modeled as values instead of errors.

text: RT @compiler_notes: Incremental builds are only fast when invalidation is boring.

text: The best AI coding sessions I have had include a real acceptance test before the first edit. The second-best include an honest friction log.

text: Question for teams using workflow engines: what event do you wish you had captured before your first production incident?

text: A cancellation path without an audit actor is just a future incident review with fewer facts.
